subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-03-21
subcodes.first_line: May this Naw-Ruz be a blessing to all the friends! In the year there are two equinoxes in which the hours of the day and the height are equal.
subcodes.first_line_orig: در سال دو نقطه اعتدال است که آفتاب از افق آن طلوع مینماید
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @spiritual springtime
